title: Verify 'Reason (why and intent)' field is mandatory when creating a validation record via UI
preconditions:
1. User is logged into the application with appropriate permissions to create validation records.
2. The UI for creating a validation record is accessible.
steps: Navigate to the 'Create Validation Record' section in the UI.
Fill in all other mandatory fields (if any) except for the 'Reason (why and intent)' field.
Attempt to save or submit the validation record.
expected_result: The system displays a mandatory error message for the 'Reason (why and intent)' field, preventing the record from being created.

title: Verify error message when updating a correction record via UI by removing all parameters/features
preconditions:
1. User is logged into the application with appropriate permissions to create and update correction records.
2. A correction record exists with at least one parameter (e.g., AXLE-CONFIG = 2X0).
3. The UI for updating correction records is accessible.
steps: Navigate to the existing correction record in the UI.
Edit the record and remove all existing parameters/features.
Attempt to save or submit the updated correction record.
expected_result: The system displays an error message: 'At least one Parameter or Feature should be either Added or Removed', preventing the update.
